name: Closed Telemark
preceding_figure_names: Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Feather Step, Hover Cross, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Top Spin
following_figure_names: Feather Step, Natural Turn, Natural Weave, Natural Telemark, Hover Cross, Natural Twist Turn, Curved Feather to Back Feather, Natural Hover Telemark

steps.action: LF fwd, FDC, HT, start to turn L, Sway(S), CBM, rise e/o 1

RF to side, almost BLOD, T, slightly less than 3/8 between 1-2, Sway(L), Up, Connect left shoulder and hip down, Swing R leg ahead of body, Strong base swivel action, body turns more equally, turn Lady back to closed position
comments: Isolate base relative to the turn of upper body.

steps.action: RF fwd in CBMP, OP, DW, H, --, Sway(S), CBM, --
RF back, BDC, TH, start to turn L, Sway(S), CBM, rise slightly e/o 1, NFR
comments: Connect right shoulder down, do not turn shoulder. Present left side up in diagonal line. Strong upward feeling.

steps.action: LF closes to RF (Heel Turn), LOD, HT, 3/8 between 1-2, Sway(R), continue to rise on 2
comments: Dance right hip across right foot, feel left side lengthen, then step RF out.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back, BDW, TH, 3/8 between 2-3, body turns less, Sway(S), Up, lower e/o 3
LF back in CBMP, BDW, T, --, Sway(S), CBM, --
